{{Infobox artifact
| name = Blood Core
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Blood Core]] is kept in a prison that looks identical to the one used for the [[Storm Core]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Blood Core]] sends a crimson pillar of light up to the ceiling.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] possesses a [[Blood Core]] that is overpowering its silver container.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Blood Core]] is a huge red sphere.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
